productDisplayName: Carlton London Men CL semi-cas Black Casual Shoes
description: Make your trips to the club all more special with these suede slip-ons from carlton london. Look classy in these semi-formal shoes, when paired with slim Fit jeans and a full sleeves shirt on a casual Friday.UpperSynthetic leather and suede upper with a suede toe boxTwo velcro straps enclosure, passing through metallic eyelets for a snug fitSuede overlay over the heel cup areaMidsoleSoft cushioned footbedFull length EVA midsole for longevityOutsoleMidsole stitched to the outsole for extra durabilityTextured durable rubber outsole for added grip and tractionshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustUse a suede brush to remove dust from suede parts
